text: Fill in the blanks on extracellular matrix components, collagen, and related disorders.
questions: Collagen is the most abundant protein in the human body, accounting for approximately *30/thirty* percent of total body protein, and its hallmark structure is the *triple helix/Triple helix*.

Every third amino acid in collagen must be *glycine/Glycine/Gly* because it is the smallest amino acid and allows tight winding, while positions X and Y are often *proline/Proline* and *hydroxyproline/Hydroxyproline*.
*Vitamin C/Ascorbic acid/ascorbate* is essential for the hydroxylation of proline and lysine in collagen synthesis; its deficiency causes *scurvy/Scurvy*.

*Osteogenesis imperfecta/OI/Brittle bone disease* is caused by mutations in *Type I/type 1* collagen genes, while vascular *Ehlers-Danlos/Ehlers-Danlos syndrome* results from defective Type III collagen.
